items.title: Airbus nabs five orders for A350 freighter at Dubai Air Show
items.description: Airbus has new orders for its next-generation A350 freighter from airlines in Azerbaijan and Abu Dhabi. The post Airbus nabs five orders for A350 freighter at Dubai Air Show appeared first on FreightWaves.

items.title: Boeing Wins $13 Billion Flydubai Deal For 737 Max
items.description: Airline signs for up to 150 jets as growth speeds up

items.title: Boeing Fights Back After Airbus Steals Flydubai Deal in $13 Billion Gulf Showdown
items.description: The Gulf's fiercest aviation rivalry just got personal--Flydubai stuns Boeing, then comes back for more.
